The crew travels to Drum Island, a winter-covered kingdom ruled by the tyrannical Wapol. While trying to save Nami, Luffy and Sanji climb a dangerous mountain to reach the only doctor available, Dr. Kureha. There, they meet Tony Tony Chopper, a shy reindeer who gained human abilities after eating a Devil Fruit and serves as Kureha’s assistant.

After confronting Wapol and helping restore hope to the island, Chopper overcomes his past fears and joins the Straw Hat crew as their new doctor, marking an important emotional and strategic addition to the team.","poster_path":"/fyOt2eCAVAB5tUpf4oOrLqX1cYD.jpg","season_number":3,"vote_average":7.6},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":39,"id":49183,"name":"Alabasta","overview":"The Straw Hats, with Kureha's assistant Tony Tony Chopper, finally arrive at Arabasta, which is on the verge of civil war. In the end, Baroque Works, marine forces, pirates, the royal guards, and the rebel army clash in a battle that will determine the fate of the country itself.","poster_path":"/lmO3xnBHVlT8On8E6AukMDyhKzv.jpg","season_number":4,"vote_average":7.6},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":13,"id":49184,"name":"Dreams!, The Zenny Pirate Crew Sortie!, Beyond the Rainbow","overview":"Season 5 of One Piece is mostly made up of original filler stories, meaning they are not part of the main manga storyline but focus on side adventures of the Straw Hat crew.

The season begins with the “Dreams!” arc, where each Straw Hat reflects on their personal goals and motivations, highlighting their determination to continue their journey.

Next is the “Zenny Pirates” arc, in which the crew encounters an elderly moneylender named Zenny who lives on an island with his unusual group of companions. What starts as a conflict gradually turns into mutual respect as the Straw Hats learn about his past.

The final arc, “Rainbow Mist,” traps Luffy and his friends inside a mysterious, time-distorting fog. There they meet children who have been separated from their families for years due to the mist’s strange effects. The crew helps them uncover the truth behind the phenomenon and find a way back home.","poster_path":"/dJHWwdcNzsbBUAnXdNsrIAgkmiK.jpg","season_number":5,"vote_average":6.5},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":52,"id":49185,"name":"Skypiea","overview":"The Straw Hats arrive on the Sky Island Skypiea and learn of its connections to Jaya and Mont Blanc Noland's tale of a lost city of gold. As the crew embarks in search of treasure, they become entangled in a three-way war between the native Skypieans, the vengeful Shandians, and the land's cruel "god", Enel.","poster_path":"/hYasiagbhomaEj0Vv1LMqewOuBE.jpg","season_number":6,"vote_average":7.0},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":33,"id":49179,"name":"G-8 & Long Ring Long Land","overview":"Season 7 of One Piece, titled “G-8 & Long Ring Long Land,” follows the Straw Hat Pirates through dangerous confrontations and unusual competitions.

The season starts with the crew infiltrating a heavily guarded Marine fortress to recover treasure that was taken from them. Using teamwork and clever strategies, they manage to escape despite being surrounded by powerful naval forces.

Afterward, they encounter Foxy the Silver Fox and his crew, who challenge them to the Davy Back Fight, a series of pirate games where the losing team must give up crew members. The contests test the Straw Hats’ unity, skills, and loyalty as they struggle against Foxy’s tricky tactics.

Later, the crew meets Admiral Aokiji, a high-ranking Marine with overwhelming power. Although he defeats Luffy with ease, he ultimately lets the crew go, but his appearance signals that far stronger enemies await them in the future.","poster_path":"/A2msjyMOBEdbSHjiPHWLZhKI5HS.jpg","season_number":7,"vote_average":7.2},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":35,"id":49192,"name":"Water Seven","overview":"The Straw Hats arrive at the oceanic metropolis of Water 7 to find a shipwright who can repair the Going Merry, as well as potentially join their crew. Between the disappearance of Robin and a schism that develops between Luffy and Usopp, the crew begins to fall apart.","poster_path":"/ww1JO056uv4KhDSycDTLkNRveIg.jpg","season_number":8,"vote_average":7.9},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":73,"id":49180,"name":"Enies Lobby","overview":"The Straw Hats, Sogeking, the Franky Family, and the shipwrights of the Galley-La Company arrive at Enies Lobby aboard the Rocketman to rescue Nico Robin and Franky. Luffy and Zoro are labelled as two of the Eleven Supernovas, rookies of significant bounties who have simultaneously arrived at the archipelago. With the odds stacked high against him, the imminent threat of Whitebeard, and the ulterior motives of pirates that wish to overthrow the Emperor, Luffy struggles to hold his own in this titanic clash of powers.","poster_path":"/zcVNRh5sqdgSgoXm0Z2GlTxF6DN.jpg","season_number":13,"vote_average":8.4},{"air_date":null,"episode_count":58,"id":49193,"name":"Fishman Island","overview":"The Straw Hat Pirates finally arrive at Fishman Island. https://api.themoviedb.org/3/collection/.data: {"id":1084247,"name":"Zootopia Collection","original_language":"en","original_name":"Zootopia Collection","overview":"Zootopia is a bustling modern metropolis inhabited solely by anthropomorphic mammals. Predators and prey have long agreed to live together in peace and equality.  Ambitious rabbit Judy Hopps becomes the city’s first bunny police officer and crosses paths with sly fox Nick Wilde. From initial distrust grows a deep friendship and partnership.  Together, the unlikely duo solves challenging cases, navigates Zootopia’s diverse districts—from icy Tundratown to the humid Rainforest District—and fights prejudice. They prove that no matter how big or small, predator or prey, anyone can achieve their dreams in Zootopia.
